info.title: Beauté Avenue API
info.description: Contract v1 for the Beauté Avenue modular monolith.

post.summary: Request an OTP code via email
Verify email OTP and create/login client

delete.summary: Delete current user account (GDPR right to erasure)

post.summary: Set the default saved payment method
Submit a review for a completed booking
Request more information for salon listing
Assign a membership or package to a client

get.summary: Get checkout details for a booking

post.summary: Initiate deposit payment for a booking

get.summary: Get available payment methods from the active provider

post.summary: Execute a payment with a specific method (two-step flow)
Manually reconcile a payment (admin or pro)
Request a presigned PUT URL for direct R2 upload
Confirm upload completed — triggers admin review

get.summary: Get public media for a salon

post.summary: Get a signed URL to preview a media asset

get.summary: List all salons with optional filters

post.summary: Create or update a salon category
Create or update a required document
